name: JoAi: Update Contract

description.en: Edit the details of an existing smart contract such as its name or description.
description.de: Bearbeite die Details eines bestehenden Smart Contracts, z. B. Name oder Beschreibung.
description.es: Edit the details of an existing smart contract such as its name or description.
description.fr: Edit the details of an existing smart contract such as its name or description.
description.ro: Edit the details of an existing smart contract such as its name or description.
description.it: Edit the details of an existing smart contract such as its name or description.

bot: Use this when the user wants to rename or update the description of an existing contract. If the user refers to a contract by name, list contracts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Contract ID

description.en: The ID of the contract to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Contracts
description.es: The ID of the contract to update
description.fr: The ID of the contract to update
description.ro: The ID of the contract to update
description.it: The ID of the contract to update

inputs.bot: The contract hash ID. If the user refers to a contract by name, list contracts first to find the matching ID.
A new name for this contract, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Updated description of what this contract does
description.de: Aktualisierte Beschreibung, was dieser Contract tut
description.es: Updated description of what this contract does
description.fr: Updated description of what this contract does
description.ro: Updated description of what this contract does
description.it: Updated description of what this contract does

inputs.bot: An updated description of this contract's purpose.
